# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_services:
- name: microservice1
  url: http://microservice1.com
  routes:
  - name: microservice1-route
    paths:
    - /microservice1_path
  plugins:
  - name: load-balancing
    config:
      type: round-robin
      targets:
      - target: target1.microservice1.com
        weight: 100
      - target: target2.microservice1.com
        weight: 50

- name: microservice2
  url: http://microservice2.com
  routes:
  - name: microservice2-route
    paths:
    - /microservice2_path
  plugins:
  - name: load-balancing
    config:
      type: round-robin
      targets:
      - target: target1.microservice2.com
        weight: 80
      - target: target2.microservice2.com
        weight: 20
